product_overview: Personal Tracker is a desktop productivity app that combines a weekly planning grid, time tracking, habit tracking, and journaling with cloud-backed synchronization to keep weekly state consistent across devices.
core_goals: Plan and manage weekly tasks and agendas in a single weekly view.
Track time spent on activities with a persistent stopwatch and store time blocks in the daily/weekly log.
Capture daily and weekly reflections through a journal and review workflow.
Define and track recurring habits with weekly targets and see progress across the week.
Organize tasks using color-coded categories and move items between backlog and weekly agenda.
Keep local changes immediate while syncing user data to the cloud for multi-device continuity.

features.name: Weekly Log (Daily Log)
features.description: A weekly grid where users record time blocks and activities, view daily totals, and review the week's timeline.
user_flows: Open the app -> Open the Weekly Log view -> Start a focused activity timer for an activity -> Stop the timer when finished -> Observe the new time block appear in the day's timeline and the day's total update
Open the app -> Open the Weekly Log view -> Manually create or edit a time block entry -> Save the entry -> Observe the updated block in the day's timeline and in weekly summary

features.name: Timer / Stopwatch
features.description: Start, pause, and stop a single active timer to log duration for tasks; active sessions persist across app restarts.
user_flows: Open the app -> Start a timer for a current task -> Observe elapsed time incrementing and an active-session indicator -> Stop the timer -> Observe the stopped session saved to today's log
Start a timer -> Attempt to start a second timer while one is active -> See an in-app prompt to stop or replace the existing active timer

features.name: Backlog & Agenda
features.description: Maintain a global backlog of unscheduled tasks and move selected items into the current week's agenda to prioritize work.
user_flows: Open the app -> Open Backlog -> Create a new backlog item with a title and optional category -> Move the backlog item into the Weekly Agenda -> Observe the item appear in the week's plan

Open the app -> Add tasks into a category in the Weekly Agenda until the category limit is reached -> Attempt to add a sixth active task to the same category -> See a validation message preventing more than five active tasks in that category

features.name: Categories
features.description: Create, edit and assign color-coded categories to organize tasks, time blocks and journal entries.
user_flows: Open the app -> Open Categories management -> Create a new category by providing a name and selecting a color -> Save the category -> Observe the category appear in the category list and become selectable when tagging items
Open the app -> Open Categories management -> Attempt to create a category without a name -> See a validation error prompting for a category name

features.name: Habits
features.description: Define custom habits with weekly targets, mark daily completions, and view habit progress inside the weekly data.
user_flows: Open the app -> Open Habits -> Add a custom habit providing a name and weekly target -> Save the habit -> Observe the new habit listed with its target
Open the app -> Open Habits for today -> Mark today's habit as complete -> Observe the habit progress update in the weekly view and habit summaries
Open the app -> Add a habit with an invalid weekly target (e.g., zero or non-numeric) -> See an input validation error preventing save

features.name: Journal
features.description: Capture daily and weekly journal entries and reviews that are stored alongside weekly data for reflection and retrospective.
user_flows: Open the app -> Open Journal -> Create a new daily entry with text content -> Save the entry -> Observe the entry appear in the day's review and contribute to the weekly review
Open the app -> Open Journal weekly review -> Browse aggregated daily entries for the week -> Observe entries organized by day for quick review

features.name: Insights
features.description: Visualize productivity metrics and habit trends across time with charts and summaries derived from weekly data.
user_flows: Open the app -> Open Insights -> Select a week or date range for review -> Observe charts showing time spent by category, habit completion trends, and weekly totals
Open the app -> Open Insights -> Toggle a chart filter (e.g., category or habit overlay) -> Observe the charts update to reflect the selected filter

features.name: Cloud Sync
features.description: Asynchronous background synchronization that treats local storage as the immediate source of truth and persists weekly data to the cloud for cross-device continuity.
user_flows: Open the app -> Make a change to weekly data (create task, stop timer, or update habit) -> Observe the local state update immediately -> Background sync queues and sends the updated week to the cloud -> Observe the app's sync status indicator update to show the week is synced
Open the app on another device -> App loads local cache and then checks cloud state -> If cloud state differs and is newer, observe the app update the local week to reflect the cloud data

features.name: Weekly Log
features.description: Core tracking feature for tasks and events in a weekly grid.

features.name: Insights
features.description: Productivity charts and habits data visualization.

features.name: Categories
features.description: Organization system for tasks with color-coded labels.

features.name: Habits
features.description: Tracking and visualizing recurring habits completion.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication via Supabase and deep-link callbacks.
